Episodes.Title: Episode #1.1
Episodes.Writer: Noah Oppenheim, Eric Newman, Michael S. Schmidt
Episodes.Actors: Robert De Niro, Jesse Plemons, Lizzy Caplan
Episodes.Plot: Former President George Mullen's comfortable retirement is upended after he's asked to lead an investigation into a horrific cyberattack.

Episodes.Title: Episode #1.2
Episodes.Writer: Noah Oppenheim, Eric Newman, Michael S. Schmidt
Episodes.Actors: Robert De Niro, Jesse Plemons, Lizzy Caplan
Episodes.Plot: Mullen's commission investigates a hacking ring. President Mitchell weighs retaliation. A powerful figure has demands for Roger.

Episodes.Title: Episode #1.3
Episodes.Writer: Roberto Patino, Eric Newman, Noah Oppenheim
Episodes.Actors: Robert De Niro, Jesse Plemons, Lizzy Caplan
Episodes.Plot: Mullen's initial arrests draw blowback from the public - especially TV pundit Evan Green. Alex faces pressure to investigate her father.

Episodes.Title: Episode #1.4
Episodes.Writer: Eli Attie, Eric Newman, Noah Oppenheim
Episodes.Actors: Robert De Niro, Jesse Plemons, Lizzy Caplan
Episodes.Plot: A shock to the financial system increases scrutiny on Mullen's commission. Valerie investigates Proteus. Roger must make a difficult choice.

Episodes.Title: Episode #1.5
Episodes.Writer: Dee Johnson, Eric Newman, Noah Oppenheim
Episodes.Actors: Robert De Niro, Jesse Plemons, Lizzy Caplan
Episodes.Plot: A personal tragedy reopens old wounds for the Mullen family. Speaker Dreyer pushes for a change in leadership. Sheila testifies before Congress.

Episodes.Title: Episode #1.6
Episodes.Writer: Noah Oppenheim, Eric Newman, Michael S. Schmidt
Episodes.Actors: Robert De Niro, Jesse Plemons, Lizzy Caplan
Episodes.Plot: A new threat creates further unrest across the nation. As he narrows in on the culprit, Mullen is faced with an agonizing decision.
